situation: audit-2026-07-02-008 finding M-006: llm._post_json() has no network error handling — urllib.error.URLError (DNS/connection refused/timeout), OSError, and json.JSONDecodeError propagate as raw exceptions through the pipeline. Callers at lines 393/480 don't catch these; only line 425 catches HTTPError. Opaque failures make debugging LLM connectivity impossible.
action: Derived route-fix from audit-2026-07-02-008 priority-9 finding. First merged pre-existing opt-llm-1782909896 (PA-M-002 timeout sanitize, f38c0b6) which refactored _post_json signature but left error handling gap. Then added LLMRequestError exception class + wrapped urlopen in try/except chain (HTTPError→sanitize body, URLError→reason, OSError→str, JSONDecodeError→message). Reused existing _sanitize_error_body helper to avoid leaking tokens in error messages. Committed to new worktree opt-llm-1782989167 (direction=llm:error-handling, route-fix area divergence from engine).
outcome_evidence: opt-worktree.sh commit succeeded; branch auto/opt-llm-1782989167 pushed to origin; diff adds LLMRequestError class + 4 except clauses in _post_json; prior worktree opt-llm-1782909896 merged to main (f38c0b6) before stacking
next_suggestion: 派生 M-007 (priority 10): storage ID generation uses non-deterministic hash() — dedup broken across processes. Use hashlib.sha256
